kept.text:
Kalo lu masih pake Claude cuma buat nanya-nanya doang, lu harus tau ini

sekarang Claude udah connect ke ratusan tools per Mei 2026

Gue pick top 10 yang menurut gue paling ok banget:

- Adobe CC: 50+ tools dalam satu connector (Photoshop, Premiere, dll)

- Canva: Render desain interaktif langsung di chat,nggak perlu pindah tab sama sekali.

- Blender: Debug scene 3D dan scripting via Python API. Tersedia gratis di semua plan.

- @higgsfield : Studio konten dalam satu URL. Bisa akses Veo, sampe Kling buat generate 4K.

- Figma: Audit design system dan bridge ke stakeholder non-teknis.

- Slack: Full communication loop. Bisa draft pesan sampe react real-time.

- Spotify: Buat playlist berdasarkan actual listening history.

- Notion: Ngurangin tab-switching buat tim knowledge-heavy.

- @github : Workflow full-stack. Implement feature Jira langsung jadi PR.

- Uber/Instacart: Eksekusi ojek dan belanjaan di dunia nyata.

Claude bukan lagi bot buat nanya. Semua studio produksi dan pipeline kerja profesional sekarang kumpul di satu interface doang.

Masih mau ribet buka puluhan tab?

profile_bio.description: Just a guy trying to keep up with AI, tech & Web3 • Sharing personal insight and professionally shitposting

kept.text:
I recently uploaded 19 of my skeumorphic icons on the Figma Community just incase you might need any at some point.

All in editable vector formats and designed in @figma 

What the statement above simply means is that you can pick a blue icon from here and easily change it to green, red, pink or whatever fits your brand.

You can also animate these in Rive or export for a Framer build or Vibecoding.

The best part is, you can pick just a part of any of the icons.

For example, the Ticket or sales labels are literally sub icons of their own. Each of the food item from the grocery bag can be used in isolation too.

Link in thread👇👇

kept.text:
"is that generated with Midjourney?" "nah Flora, but with Nano Banana pro specifically" "oh you can do that in Reve?" "yeah, or better to turn into video in Glif" "vectorizing is easier in QuiverAI bro" "but how'd you get it into Figma?" "Framer actually, but explored layouts in Variant first" "wait can Claude do that?" "Claude Cowork? or Claude Code?" "no bro, Claude Design!" "heard it's same as Replit" "and Lovable" "but you could do that with Canva, too" 

just one more generative AI tool bro. trust me bro. just one more and design will be solved.

kept.text:
これに近い駿○屋対応で、頼んだ開封済みFigma渡辺曜が開けたらあんよがどう見てもバイオニックジョシコウセイのあんよに換装されてて問い合わせたら別品あるんで送ります、バルク品なので手元のは破棄して結構ですと交換とかじゃない謎対応だったな。
バルク品曜は破棄できず今も家で活躍してる。

profile_bio.description:
口が悪い。現代では使っちゃいけない昭和の野蛮言葉も平気で使う。好きな言葉の語感は『ルンペン』！
品の良い方は回れ右。
お上品？つまんね人生だな！

quoted_tweet.text: @b_lackman666 @mitokon2ooo 自分自身はそういった対応に出くわしたことはまだないんですが、相互さんがプレ値の中古品買ったらヒビが入ってて、問い合わせたら二人体制でチェックして問題がないから発送したのでこちらに落ち度はないですが、ヒビが入ってるので返金します(？)という訳の分からない返答をもらったみたいです。
